design.positive_observation: independent Bernoulli(c) among true train positives
design.hidden_truth_policy: used only to construct the simulated observed-positive mask and fit the explicit full-supervised ceiling; unavailable to PU arm targets

bootstrap.reported_for: F1, F1/full-upper recovery, F1 delta vs full upper

arm_definitions.naive_logistic: cross-fitted logistic trained on z as ordinary P/N
arm_definitions.naive_tree: HistGBDT trained on z as ordinary P/N
arm_definitions.nnpu_logistic: nonnegative logistic PU empirical risk with pi=z_mean/c_hat
arm_definitions.bagging_pu_tree: mean of balanced observed-P versus sampled-U HistGBDT bags
arm_definitions.posterior_imputation_tree: weighted Bernoulli imputation from cross-fitted q_star
arm_definitions.full_supervised_upper: HistGBDT fit to complete train truth
arm_definitions.shuffle_control: HistGBDT fit to globally permuted z

design.recovery_rate_definition: arm val metric divided by same-seed full-supervised val metric

preflight_benchmark.projection_basis: linear extrapolation from drawing-spread train sample

crossfit.method: Elkan-Noto mean cross-fitted g(x) on observed positives

investigation.reason: three primary 12-feature shuffle rows exceeded ROC-AUC 0.55
investigation.conclusion: no direct ID/path/split feature leak was found; the null-control ranking is unstable in both directions and the independent base-6 permutations quantify whether the excursions persist without context features

limitations: simulated missingness is SCAR and does not establish robustness to real SAR anchors
val is a development surface, not a held-out or final claim
ranking metrics do not receive bootstrap intervals in this cell
